exits.blocked: The door is boarded and you can't remove the boards.

Stone Barrow.name: Stone Barrow
Stone Barrow.ldesc: You are standing in front of a massive barrow of stone. In the east face is a huge stone door which is open. You cannot see into the dark of the tomb.

North of House.name: North of House
North of House.ldesc: You are facing the north side of a white house. There is no door here, and all the windows are boarded up. To the north a narrow path winds through the trees.

exits.blocked: The windows are all boarded.

South of House.name: South of House
South of House.ldesc: You are facing the south side of a white house. There is no door here, and all the windows are boarded.

exits.blocked: The windows are all boarded.

Forest.name: Forest
Forest.ldesc: This is a forest, with trees in all directions. To the east, there appears to be sunlight.

exits.blocked: There is no tree here suitable for climbing.
You would need a machete to go further west.

Forest (FOREST-2).name: Forest
Forest (FOREST-2).ldesc: This is a dimly lit forest, with large trees all around.

exits.blocked: There is no tree here suitable for climbing.
The forest becomes impenetrable to the north.

Forest (MOUNTAINS).name: Forest
Forest (MOUNTAINS).ldesc: The forest thins out, revealing impassable mountains.

exits.blocked: The mountains are impassable.
The mountains are impassable.

Forest (FOREST-3).name: Forest
Forest (FOREST-3).ldesc: This is a dimly lit forest, with large trees all around.

exits.blocked: There is no tree here suitable for climbing.
The rank undergrowth prevents eastward movement.
Storm-tossed trees block your way.

Forest Path.name: Forest Path
Forest Path.ldesc: This is a path winding through a dimly lit forest. The path heads north-south here. One particularly large tree with some low branches stands at the edge of the path.

exits.blocked: You cannot climb any higher.
The forest becomes impenetrable to the north.

Clearing (CLEARING).name: Clearing
Clearing (CLEARING).ldesc: You are in a small clearing in a well marked forest path that extends to the east and west.

exits.blocked: There is no tree here suitable for climbing.

exits.else_blocked: Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys.

Attic.name: Attic
Attic.ldesc: This is the attic. The only exit is a stairway leading down.

exits.blocked: You try to ascend the ramp, but it is impossible, and you slide back down.

The Troll Room.name: The Troll Room
The Troll Room.ldesc: This is a small room with passages to the east and south and a forbidding hole leading west. Bloodstains and deep scratches (perhaps made by an axe) mar the walls.

exits.else_blocked: The troll fends you off with a menacing gesture.
The troll fends you off with a menacing gesture.

East of Chasm.name: East of Chasm
East of Chasm.ldesc: You are on the east edge of a chasm, the bottom of which cannot be seen. A narrow passage goes north, and the path you are on continues to the east.

exits.blocked: The chasm probably leads straight to the infernal regions.

Gallery.name: Gallery
Gallery.ldesc: This is an art gallery. Most of the paintings have been stolen by vandals with exceptional taste. The vandals left through either the north or west exits.

Studio.name: Studio
Studio.ldesc: This appears to have been an artist's studio. The walls and floors are splattered with paints of 69 different colors. Strangely enough, nothing of value is hanging here. At the south end of the room is an open door (also covered with paint). A dark and narrow chimney leads up from a fireplace; although you might be able to get up it, it seems unlikely you could get back down.

Maze.name: Maze
Maze.ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

Maze (MAZE-2).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-2).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

Maze (MAZE-3).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-3).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

Maze (MAZE-4).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-4).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

Dead End.name: Dead End
Dead End.ldesc: You have come to a dead end in the maze.

Maze (MAZE-5).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-5).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike. A skeleton, probably the remains of a luckless adventurer, lies here.

Dead End (DEAD-END-2).name: Dead End
Dead End (DEAD-END-2).ldesc: You have come to a dead end in the maze.

Maze (MAZE-6).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-6).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

Maze (MAZE-7).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-7).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

Maze (MAZE-8).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-8).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

Dead End (DEAD-END-3).name: Dead End
Dead End (DEAD-END-3).ldesc: You have come to a dead end in the maze.

Maze (MAZE-9).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-9).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

Maze (MAZE-10).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-10).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

Maze (MAZE-11).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-11).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

Maze (MAZE-12).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-12).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

Dead End (DEAD-END-4).name: Dead End
Dead End (DEAD-END-4).ldesc: You have come to a dead end in the maze.

Maze (MAZE-13).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-13).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

Maze (MAZE-14).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-14).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

Maze (MAZE-15).name: Maze
Maze (MAZE-15).ldesc: This is part of a maze of twisty little passages, all alike.

exits.else_blocked: The east wall is solid rock.
The cyclops doesn't look like he'll let you past.

Strange Passage.name: Strange Passage
Strange Passage.ldesc: This is a long passage. To the west is one entrance. On the east there is an old wooden door, with a large opening in it (about cyclops sized).

Treasure Room.name: Treasure Room
Treasure Room.ldesc: This is a large room, whose east wall is solid granite. A number of discarded bags, which crumble at your touch, are scattered about on the floor. There is an exit down a staircase.

exits.blocked: The dam blocks your way.

Stream View.name: Stream View
Stream View.ldesc: You are standing on a path beside a gently flowing stream. The path follows the stream, which flows from west to east.

exits.blocked: The stream emerges from a spot too small for you to enter.

Stream.name: Stream
Stream.ldesc: You are on the gently flowing stream. The upstream route is too narrow to navigate, and the downstream route is invisible due to twisting walls. There is a narrow beach to land on.

exits.blocked: The channel is too narrow.
The channel is too narrow.

Cave.name: Cave
Cave.ldesc: This is a tiny cave with entrances west and north, and a staircase leading down.

Cave (TINY-CAVE).name: Cave
Cave (TINY-CAVE).ldesc: This is a tiny cave with entrances west and north, and a dark, forbidding staircase leading down.

Cold Passage.name: Cold Passage
Cold Passage.ldesc: This is a cold and damp corridor where a long east-west passageway turns into a southward path.

Narrow Passage.name: Narrow Passage
Narrow Passage.ldesc: This is a long and narrow corridor where a long north-south passageway briefly narrows even further.

Winding Passage.name: Winding Passage
Winding Passage.ldesc: This is a winding passage. It seems that there are only exits on the east and north.

Twisting Passage.name: Twisting Passage
Twisting Passage.ldesc: This is a winding passage. It seems that there are only exits on the east and north.

Atlantis Room.name: Atlantis Room
Atlantis Room.ldesc: This is an ancient room, long under water. There is an exit to the south and a staircase leading up.

East-West Passage.name: East-West Passage
East-West Passage.ldesc: This is a narrow east-west passageway. There is a narrow stairway leading down at the north end of the room.

Round Room.name: Round Room
Round Room.ldesc: This is a circular stone room with passages in all directions. Several of them have unfortunately been blocked by cave-ins.

Damp Cave.name: Damp Cave
Damp Cave.ldesc: This cave has exits to the west and east, and narrows to a crack toward the south. The earth is particularly damp here.

exits.blocked: It is too narrow for most insects.

North-South Passage.name: North-South Passage
North-South Passage.ldesc: This is a high north-south passage, which forks to the northeast.

Chasm.name: Chasm
Chasm.ldesc: A chasm runs southwest to northeast and the path follows it. You are on the south side of the chasm, where a crack opens into a passage.

exits.blocked: Are you out of your mind?

exits.else_blocked: Some invisible force prevents you from passing through the gate.
Some invisible force prevents you from passing through the gate.

Land of the Dead.name: Land of the Dead
Land of the Dead.ldesc: You have entered the Land of the Living Dead. Thousands of lost souls can be heard weeping and moaning. In the corner are stacked the remains of dozens of previous adventurers less fortunate than yourself. A passage exits to the north.

Engravings Cave.name: Engravings Cave
Engravings Cave.ldesc: You have entered a low cave with passages leading northwest and east.

Egyptian Room.name: Egyptian Room
Egyptian Room.ldesc: This is a room which looks like an Egyptian tomb. There is an ascending staircase to the west.

exits.else_blocked: You cannot go down without fracturing many bones.

exits.blocked: You cannot reach the rope.

Temple.name: Temple
Temple.ldesc: This is the north end of a large temple. On the east wall is an ancient inscription, probably a prayer in a long-forgotten language. Below the prayer is a staircase leading down. The west wall is solid granite. The exit to the north end of the room is through huge marble pillars.

Altar.name: Altar
Altar.ldesc: This is the south end of a large temple. In front of you is what appears to be an altar. In one corner is a small hole in the floor which leads into darkness. You probably could not get back up it.

exits.else_blocked: You haven't a prayer of getting the coffin down there.

Dam Lobby.name: Dam Lobby
Dam Lobby.ldesc: This room appears to have been the waiting room for groups touring the dam. There are open doorways here to the north and east marked \"Private\", and there is a path leading south over the top of the dam.

Maintenance Room.name: Maintenance Room
Maintenance Room.ldesc: This is what appears to have been the maintenance room for Flood Control Dam #3. Apparently, this room has been ransacked recently, for most of the valuable equipment is gone. On the wall in front of you is a group of buttons colored blue, yellow, brown, and red. There are doorways to the west and south.

Dam Base.name: Dam Base
Dam Base.ldesc: You are at the base of Flood Control Dam #3, which looms above you and to the north. The river Frigid is flowing by here. Along the river are the White Cliffs which seem to form giant walls stretching from north to south along the shores of the river as it winds its way downstream.

Frigid River.name: Frigid River
Frigid River.ldesc: You are on the Frigid River in the vicinity of the Dam. The river flows quietly here. There is a landing on the west shore.

exits.blocked: You cannot go upstream due to strong currents.
The White Cliffs prevent your landing here.

Frigid River (RIVER-2).name: Frigid River
Frigid River (RIVER-2).ldesc: The river turns a corner here making it impossible to see the Dam. The White Cliffs loom on the east bank and large rocks prevent landing on the west.

exits.blocked: You cannot go upstream due to strong currents.
There is no safe landing spot here.
The White Cliffs prevent your landing here.
Just in time you steer away from the rocks.

Frigid River (RIVER-3).name: Frigid River
Frigid River (RIVER-3).ldesc: The river descends here into a valley. There is a narrow beach on the west shore below the cliffs. In the distance a faint rumbling can be heard.

exits.blocked: You cannot go upstream due to strong currents.

White Cliffs Beach.name: White Cliffs Beach
White Cliffs Beach.ldesc: You are on a narrow strip of beach which runs along the base of the White Cliffs. There is a narrow path heading south along the Cliffs and a tight passage leading west into the cliffs themselves.

White Cliffs Beach (WHITE-CLIFFS-SOUTH).name: White Cliffs Beach
White Cliffs Beach (WHITE-CLIFFS-SOUTH).ldesc: You are on a rocky, narrow strip of beach beside the Cliffs. A narrow path leads north along the shore.

Frigid River (RIVER-4).name: Frigid River
Frigid River (RIVER-4).ldesc: The river is running faster here and the sound ahead appears to be that of rushing water. On the east shore is a sandy beach. A small area of beach can also be seen below the cliffs on the west shore.

exits.blocked: You cannot go upstream due to strong currents.
You can land either to the east or the west.

Frigid River (RIVER-5).name: Frigid River
Frigid River (RIVER-5).ldesc: The sound of rushing water is nearly unbearable here. On the east shore is a large landing area.

exits.blocked: You cannot go upstream due to strong currents.

Shore.name: Shore
Shore.ldesc: You are on the east shore of the river. The water here seems somewhat treacherous. A path travels from north to south here, the south end quickly turning around a sharp corner.

Sandy Beach.name: Sandy Beach
Sandy Beach.ldesc: You are on a large sandy beach on the east shore of the river, which is flowing quickly by. A path runs beside the river to the south here, and a passage is partially buried in sand to the northeast.

Sandy Cave.name: Sandy Cave
Sandy Cave.ldesc: This is a sand-filled cave whose exit is to the southwest.

exits.blocked: It's a long way...

On the Rainbow.name: On the Rainbow
On the Rainbow.ldesc: You are on top of a rainbow (I bet you never thought you would walk on a rainbow), with a magnificent view of the Falls. The rainbow travels east-west here.

End of Rainbow.name: End of Rainbow
End of Rainbow.ldesc: You are on a small, rocky beach on the continuation of the Frigid River past the Falls. The beach is narrow due to the presence of the White Cliffs. The river canyon opens here and sunlight shines in from above. A rainbow crosses over the falls to the east and a narrow path continues to the southwest.

Canyon Bottom.name: Canyon Bottom
Canyon Bottom.ldesc: You are beneath the walls of the river canyon which may be climbable here. The lesser part of the runoff of Aragain Falls flows by below. To the north is a narrow path.

Rocky Ledge.name: Rocky Ledge
Rocky Ledge.ldesc: You are on a ledge about halfway up the wall of the river canyon. You can see from here that the main flow from Aragain Falls twists along a passage which it is impossible for you to enter. Below you is the canyon bottom. Above you is more cliff, which appears climbable.

Canyon View.name: Canyon View
Canyon View.ldesc: You are at the top of the Great Canyon on its west wall. From here there is a marvelous view of the canyon and parts of the Frigid River upstream. Across the canyon, the walls of the White Cliffs join the mighty ramparts of the Flathead Mountains to the east. Following the Canyon upstream to the north, Aragain Falls may be seen, complete with rainbow. The mighty Frigid River flows out from a great dark cavern. To the west and south can be seen an immense forest, stretching for miles around. A path leads northwest. It is possible to climb down into the canyon from here.

exits.blocked: Storm-tossed trees block your way.

Mine Entrance.name: Mine Entrance
Mine Entrance.ldesc: You are standing at the entrance of what might have been a coal mine. The shaft enters the west wall, and there is another exit on the south end of the room.

Squeaky Room.name: Squeaky Room
Squeaky Room.ldesc: You are in a small room. Strange squeaky sounds may be heard coming from the passage at the north end. You may also escape to the east.

Shaft Room.name: Shaft Room
Shaft Room.ldesc: This is a large room, in the middle of which is a small shaft descending through the floor into darkness below. To the west and the north are exits from this room. Constructed over the top of the shaft is a metal framework to which a heavy iron chain is attached.

exits.blocked: You wouldn't fit and would die if you could.

Smelly Room.name: Smelly Room
Smelly Room.ldesc: This is a small nondescript room. However, from the direction of a small descending staircase a foul odor can be detected. To the south is a narrow tunnel.

Gas Room.name: Gas Room
Gas Room.ldesc: This is a small room which smells strongly of coal gas. There is a short climb up some stairs and a narrow tunnel leading east.

Ladder Top.name: Ladder Top
Ladder Top.ldesc: This is a very small room. In the corner is a rickety wooden ladder, leading downward. It might be safe to descend. There is also a staircase leading upward.

Ladder Bottom.name: Ladder Bottom
Ladder Bottom.ldesc: This is a rather wide room. On one side is the bottom of a narrow wooden ladder. To the west and the south are passages leaving the room.

Dead End (DEAD-END-5).name: Dead End
Dead End (DEAD-END-5).ldesc: You have come to a dead end in the mine.

Timber Room.name: Timber Room
Timber Room.ldesc: This is a long and narrow passage, which is cluttered with broken timbers. A wide passage comes from the east and turns at the west end of the room into a very narrow passageway. From the west comes a strong draft.

exits.else_blocked: You cannot fit through this passage with that load.

Drafty Room.name: Drafty Room
Drafty Room.ldesc: This is a small drafty room in which is the bottom of a long shaft. To the south is a passageway and to the east a very narrow passage. In the shaft can be seen a heavy iron chain.

exits.else_blocked: You cannot fit through this passage with that load.
You cannot fit through this passage with that load.

Coal Mine.name: Coal Mine
Coal Mine.ldesc: This is a nondescript part of a coal mine.

Coal Mine (MINE-2).name: Coal Mine
Coal Mine (MINE-2).ldesc: This is a nondescript part of a coal mine.

Coal Mine (MINE-3).name: Coal Mine
Coal Mine (MINE-3).ldesc: This is a nondescript part of a coal mine.

Coal Mine (MINE-4).name: Coal Mine
Coal Mine (MINE-4).ldesc: This is a nondescript part of a coal mine.

Slide Room.name: Slide Room
Slide Room.ldesc: This is a small chamber, which appears to have been part of a coal mine. On the south wall of the chamber the letters \"Granite Wall\" are etched in the rock. To the east is a long passage, and there is a steep metal slide twisting downward. To the north is a small opening.

crystal skull.name: crystal skull
crystal skull.fdesc: Lying in one corner of the room is a beautifully carved crystal skull. It appears to be grinning at you rather nastily.

basket.name: basket
basket.ldesc: From the chain is suspended a basket.

basket (RAISED-BASKET).name: basket
basket (RAISED-BASKET).ldesc: At the end of the chain is a basket.

lunch.name: lunch
lunch.ldesc: A hot pepper sandwich is here.

red hot brass bell.name: red hot brass bell
red hot brass bell.ldesc: On the ground is a red hot bell.

black book.name: black book
black book.fdesc: On the altar is a large black book, open to page 569.

sceptre.name: sceptre
sceptre.ldesc: An ornamented sceptre, tapering to a sharp point, is here.
sceptre.fdesc: A sceptre, possibly that of ancient Egypt itself, is in the coffin. The sceptre is ornamented with colored enamel, and tapers to a sharp point.

brown sack.name: brown sack
brown sack.fdesc: On the table is an elongated brown sack, smelling of hot peppers.

chalice.name: chalice
chalice.ldesc: There is a silver chalice, intricately engraved, here.

crystal trident.name: crystal trident
crystal trident.fdesc: On the shore lies Poseidon's own crystal trident.

glass bottle.name: glass bottle
glass bottle.fdesc: A bottle is sitting on the table.

gold coffin.name: gold coffin
gold coffin.ldesc: The solid-gold coffin used for the burial of Ramses II is here.

huge diamond.name: huge diamond
huge diamond.ldesc: There is an enormous diamond (perfectly cut) here.

jade figurine.name: jade figurine
jade figurine.ldesc: There is an exquisite jade figurine here.

nasty knife.name: nasty knife
nasty knife.fdesc: On a table is a nasty-looking knife.

burned-out lantern.name: burned-out lantern
burned-out lantern.fdesc: The deceased adventurer's useless lantern is here.

leather bag of coins.name: leather bag of coins
leather bag of coins.ldesc: An old leather bag, bulging with coins, is here.

brass lantern.name: brass lantern
brass lantern.ldesc: There is a brass lantern (battery-powered) here.
brass lantern.fdesc: A battery-powered brass lantern is on the trophy case.

leaflet.name: leaflet
leaflet.ldesc: A small leaflet is on the ground.
leaflet.text: \"WELCOME TO ZORK!| | ZORK is a game of adventure, danger, and low cunning. In it you will explore some of the most amazing territory ever seen by mortals. No computer should be without one!\"

matchbook.name: matchbook
matchbook.ldesc: There is a matchbook whose cover says \"Visit Beautiful FCD#3\" here.

painting.name: painting
painting.ldesc: A painting by a neglected genius is here.
painting.fdesc: Fortunately, there is still one chance for you to be a vandal, for on the far wall is a painting of unparalleled beauty.

pair of candles.name: pair of candles
pair of candles.fdesc: On the two ends of the altar are burning candles.

pile of leaves.name: pile of leaves
pile of leaves.ldesc: On the ground is a pile of leaves.

pile of plastic.name: pile of plastic
pile of plastic.ldesc: There is a folded pile of plastic here which has a small valve attached.

platinum bar.name: platinum bar
platinum bar.ldesc: On the ground is a large platinum bar.

pot of gold.name: pot of gold
pot of gold.fdesc: At the end of the rainbow is a pot of gold.

red buoy.name: red buoy
red buoy.fdesc: There is a red buoy here (probably a warning).

rope.name: rope
rope.fdesc: A large coil of rope is lying in the corner.

rusty knife.name: rusty knife
rusty knife.fdesc: Beside the skeleton is a rusty knife.

wooden door.name: wooden door
wooden door.text: The engravings translate to \"This space intentionally left blank.\"

sword.name: sword
sword.fdesc: Above the trophy case hangs an elvish sword of great antiquity.

ancient map.name: ancient map
ancient map.fdesc: In the trophy case is an ancient parchment which appears to be a map.
ancient map.text: The map shows a forest with three clearings. The largest clearing contains a house. Three paths leave the large clearing. One of these paths, leading southwest, is marked \"To Stone Barrow\".

thief.name: thief
thief.ldesc: There is a suspicious-looking individual, holding a large bag, leaning against one wall. He is armed with a deadly stiletto.

torch.name: torch
torch.fdesc: Sitting on the pedestal is a flaming torch, made of ivory.

tour guidebook.name: tour guidebook
tour guidebook.fdesc: Some guidebooks entitled \"Flood Control Dam #3\" are on the reception desk.

troll.name: troll
troll.ldesc: A nasty-looking troll, brandishing a bloody axe, blocks all passages out of the room.

trunk of jewels.name: trunk of jewels
trunk of jewels.ldesc: There is an old trunk here, bulging with assorted jewels.
trunk of jewels.fdesc: Lying half buried in the mud is an old trunk, bulging with jewels.

tube.name: tube
tube.ldesc: There is an object which looks like a tube of toothpaste here.
tube.text: ---> Frobozz Magic Gunk Company <---| All-Purpose Gunk

wall with engravings.name: wall with engravings
wall with engravings.ldesc: There are old engravings on the walls here.
wall with engravings.text: The engravings were incised in the living rock of the cave wall by an unknown hand. They depict, in symbolic form, the beliefs of the ancient Zorkers. Skillfully interwoven with the bas reliefs are excerpts illustrating the major religious tenets of that time. Unfortunately, a later age seems to have considered them blasphemous and just as skillfully excised them.

ZORK owner's manual.name: ZORK owner's manual
ZORK owner's manual.fdesc: Loosely attached to a wall is a small piece of paper.
ZORK owner's manual.text: Congratulations!| | You are the privileged owner of ZORK I: The Great Underground Empire, a self-contained and self-maintaining universe. If used and maintained in accordance with normal operating practices for small universes, ZORK will provide many months of trouble-free operation.

bird's nest.name: bird's nest
bird's nest.fdesc: Beside you on the branch is a small bird's nest.

jewel-encrusted egg.name: jewel-encrusted egg
jewel-encrusted egg.fdesc: In the bird's nest is a large egg encrusted with precious jewels, apparently scavenged by a childless songbird. The egg is covered with fine gold inlay, and ornamented in lapis lazuli and mother-of-pearl. Unlike most eggs, this one is hinged and closed with a delicate looking clasp. The egg appears extremely fragile.

broken jewel-encrusted egg.name: broken jewel-encrusted egg
broken jewel-encrusted egg.ldesc: There is a somewhat ruined egg here.

golden clockwork canary.name: golden clockwork canary
golden clockwork canary.fdesc: There is a golden clockwork canary nestled in the egg. It has ruby eyes and a silver beak. Through a crystal window below its left wing you can see intricate machinery inside. It appears to have wound down.

broken clockwork canary.name: broken clockwork canary
broken clockwork canary.fdesc: There is a golden clockwork canary nestled in the egg. It seems to have recently had a bad experience. The mountings for its jewel-like eyes are empty, and its silver beak is crumpled. Through a cracked crystal window below its left wing you can see the remains of intricate machinery. It is not clear what result winding it would have, as the mainspring seems sprung.
